def positive_python_perf_layer_caching_cached_value_immediately_deserialized():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_caching_cached_value_immediately_deserialized"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Caching. Flag caches storing serialized data only to deserialize before every use."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
